overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character with a flashlight exploring a dark forest at night. The character walks along a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense trees and undergrowth, passing a small wooden shelter structure. The atmosphere is tense and atmospheric with dramatic flashlight illumination cutting through the darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with rocky outcrops

events.description: wooden shelter structure becomes visible through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the forest path with flashlight illuminating the way forward

entered.detail: dark silhouettes of tall pine trees forming the forest canopy
thick ferns and shrubs lining the path
narrow winding trail covered in leaves and dirt

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense forest at night, flashlight beam cutting through the darkness to reveal a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall pines and thick undergrowth. The atmosphere is claustrophobic and tense as the character approaches a wooden structure visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest clearing with abandoned wooden shelter

events.description: character approaches and passes the small wooden shelter structure
flashlight illuminates the interior of the wooden shelter briefly

agents.ego_description: cautiously approaching and circling the wooden shelter while scanning the area with the flashlight

entered.detail: small open-air wooden shed with a sloped roof, partially overgrown with vegetation
large moss-covered rock beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a small wooden shelter in a forest clearing, passing closely by its weathered structure. The flashlight sweeps across the abandoned building and surrounding boulders before the character continues past, leaving the shelter behind as the path winds deeper into the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest interior with rocky terrain

events.description: path becomes darker and more enclosed as the shelter is left behind

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding forest path into increasingly dense and dark woodland

entered.detail: cluster of rocks covered in green moss lining the trail
dense patch of ferns illuminated by the flashlight beam

segments.scene_description: Moving past the shelter, the character enters a darker, more enclosed section of forest where the canopy blocks out any remaining ambient light. The flashlight reveals mossy rocks and thick ferns lining the narrow trail as the character presses deeper into the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a dark, oppressive forest that transitions from a narrow trail into a brief clearing before descending into a dense, enclosed wilderness. It begins with a flashlight beam cutting through the darkness of a claustrophobic path lined with tall pines and thick undergrowth. As the character advances, the environment opens into a small clearing where the light sweeps across a weathered wooden shelter and surrounding boulders. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the structure behind, moving into a darker section of the woods where the canopy closes in to block out all ambient light. Finally, the camera presses deeper into the wilderness, revealing mossy rocks and thick ferns lining the trail under the solitary glow of the flashlight.
